concept: Generative Pages with Virtual Tables - External Data Sources
description: Using Generative Pages with data sources beyond native Dataverse through virtual tables - connecting to SharePoint, SQL, Snowflake and other external systems while maintaining full CRUD capabilities.

key_capabilities.description: Dataverse tables that connect to external data sources without data migration
key_capabilities.behavior: Schema lives in Dataverse, actual data queried from source in real-time

key_capabilities.description: Modal dialogs for displaying full record details
key_capabilities.example: Event details dialog showing full event information

key_capabilities.description: Forms that slide in from screen edges for add/edit operations
key_capabilities.natural_language: The add edit form should fly in from left to right off the screen
key_capabilities.use_case: Add new event, edit existing event

key_capabilities.description: Side panel with clickable category filters
key_capabilities.example: Product catalog filtered by Electronics, Automotive

key_capabilities.description: Slider or range selector for numeric filtering
key_capabilities.example: Show products in specific price range

data_source_options.use_case: Keep data in external source, enable Gen Pages in model-driven app
steps: Full CRUD operations against original data source

data_source_options.behavior: Creates Dataverse table with schema + imports data

sharepoint_embedding.scenario: Embed model-driven app Gen Page inside SharePoint
steps: Create iframe code with src=app URL
If blocked: Site Settings → HTML Field Security
Add domain to allowed iframe sources
sharepoint_embedding.limitation: Standard Power Apps web part only supports canvas apps, not model-driven
sharepoint_embedding.workaround: Use Embed web part with iframe HTML

app_agent_features: Agent Thoughts - shows AI's understanding of requirements
Undo functionality - revert changes that don't match expectations
Start from scratch - full regeneration if needed
Natural language iteration throughout build process
design_inspiration_workflow: Find design on Dribbble or similar
Attach as inspiration image in Gen Pages

key_quotes.quote: A virtual table is one where the data lives in your data source... In data versse, it will create the schema. It will query your underlying data source to bring the data.
key_quotes.significance: Core concept of virtual tables explained

key_quotes.quote: All of this create, read, update, delete actions will be against my data source. In this case, SharePoint list in my SharePoint site.
key_quotes.significance: Full CRUD operations work against original external data source

key_quotes.quote: The Microsoft Power Apps one only allows canvas apps for model driven. If I go to embed, I can add embed code.
key_quotes.significance: Workaround for embedding model-driven apps in SharePoint

limitations_notes: Gen Pages currently requires Dataverse (can't connect directly to SharePoint/SQL without virtual table)
Virtual tables require proper connection setup and permissions
iframe embedding requires HTML Field Security configuration in SharePoint
prerequisites: SharePoint site access (if using SharePoint virtual table)
